patterns: What is Simpliance Remo?
Explain Simpliance Remo.
What is Simpliance?
Tell me about Simpliance Remo.
Why use Simpliance Remo?
What does Simpliance Remo do?
What is this platform?
What is Simpliance Remo used for?
responses: Simpliance Remo is an end-to-end E-Compliance management platform that helps companies of all sizes maintain compliance, avoid penalties, and manage risks related to legal, policy, or ethical violations.
It’s a comprehensive compliance platform designed to help businesses proactively manage compliance, avoid reputational damage, and ensure operational continuity.
Simpliance Remo is a tool that helps organizations identify, prioritize, and manage compliance risks, ensuring they meet legal and ethical standards.

patterns: What devices support Simpliance Remo?
Can I use Simpliance Remo on mobile?
Is Simpliance Remo available for iOS?
Does Simpliance Remo work on Android?
What operating systems does Simpliance Remo support?
Can I use Simpliance Remo on my laptop?
Is Simpliance Remo compatible with tablets?
Does Simpliance Remo work on PCs?
responses: Simpliance Remo is compatible with iOS (iPhone, iPad, iPod) and Android devices, as well as PCs and laptops.
You can use Simpliance Remo on mobile phones, tablets, laptops, and desktops running iOS or Android.
Yes, Simpliance Remo supports both iOS and Android operating systems, making it accessible on a wide range of devices.

patterns: What products does Simpliance Remo offer?
What is included in Simpliance Remo?
What features does Simpliance Remo have?
What does Simpliance Remo provide?
What tools are available in Simpliance Remo?
What is the product of Simpliance Remo?
responses: Simpliance Remo is a cloud-based SaaS platform that offers compliance task tracking, scheduling, and a secure virtual data room for record storage.
It provides tools for automating compliance tasks, tracking progress, and storing compliance records securely in the cloud.
Simpliance Remo includes features like task automation, compliance tracking, and a secure virtual data room for managing compliance records.

patterns: How does Simpliance Remo work?
What is the working process of Simpliance Remo?
How does this platform function?
Can you explain how Simpliance Remo operates?
What is the workflow of Simpliance Remo?
responses: Simpliance Remo automates compliance tasks, tracks progress, and sends notifications to ensure timely compliance with state and central laws.
It works by automating compliance processes, tracking tasks, and providing alerts to help users stay on top of their compliance requirements.
The platform ensures compliance by automating tasks, tracking deadlines, and sending reminders to users.

patterns: How often are updates provided?
What sources are used for compliance updates?
Can I get alerts for regulatory changes?
How does Simpliance Remo track compliance impacts?
Can I access historical compliance updates?
What documents are included in the knowledge repository?
How is the repository organized?
How are compliance records stored securely?
Is the repository user-friendly?
Can I export compliance records?
responses: Simpliance Remo provides regular updates on new regulations and ensures secure, centralized storage of compliance records.
The platform offers a comprehensive knowledge repository, automated alerts, and tools for exporting compliance records.
You can access historical updates, track compliance impacts, and export records for audits or reviews.

patterns: How do I register for Simpliance Remo?
What is the registration process?
How do I create an account?
What do I need to register?
How long is the registration link valid?
responses: To register, create a unique user ID and password. The registration link is valid for 48 hours.
You need to complete the registration process within 48 hours. Contact the admin if the link expires.
Register by creating a user ID and password. Ensure you complete the process before the link expires.

patterns: How do I log in to Simpliance Remo?
What are the login steps?
How do I access my account?
What credentials do I need to log in?
Can I log in from any device?
responses: Log in using your user ID and password at https://login.simplianceglobal.com.
Enter your credentials and the captcha to log in. You can access your account from any supported device.
To log in, visit the login page, enter your user ID, password, and captcha, then click 'Login.'

patterns: What is on the home page?
What can I see on the dashboard?
What widgets are available?
How do I navigate the home page?
What does the home page display?
responses: The home page displays a welcome message and customizable widgets like Compliance Status, Compliance Trend, and Risk Chart.
You can explore widgets like Compliance Status, Overdue Tasks, and User Scorecard on the home page.
The home page provides an overview of your compliance status, trends, and tasks through interactive widgets.

patterns: What features are on the dashboard?
What can I do on the dashboard?
How do I use the dashboard?
What does the dashboard show?
Can I customize the dashboard?
responses: The dashboard provides an at-a-glance view of compliance status, trends, and risks. You can customize widgets and download charts.
You can view compliance trends, overdue tasks, and risk charts on the dashboard. Charts can be downloaded in multiple formats.
The dashboard offers tools to track compliance, view trends, and manage risks. You can customize it to suit your needs.

patterns: What is the Criticality Chart?
How does risk analysis work?
What are the criticality factors?
How do I evaluate risks?
Can I customize risk factors?
responses: The Criticality Chart evaluates risks based on factors like financial exposure, prosecution, and fines. You can customize these factors.
Risk analysis in Simpliance Remo uses factors like Penal Financial Exposure, Prosecution Exposure, and Simple Fines to assess risks.
You can customize criticality factors to align with your organization’s risk management strategy.

patterns: What is MFA in Simpliance Remo?
How does MFA work?
Is MFA mandatory?
What are the MFA steps?
Can I disable MFA?
responses: MFA requires users to provide two or more authentication factors, such as a password and OTP, to access Simpliance Remo.
MFA enhances security by requiring additional verification, like an OTP sent to your mobile number, during login.
MFA can be enabled or disabled by the admin. It adds an extra layer of security to your account.

patterns: What is SSO in Simpliance Remo?
How do I enable SSO?
Can I use SSO for multiple apps?
What are the benefits of SSO?
How do I configure SSO?
responses: SSO allows you to access multiple applications using one set of credentials. Contact the admin to enable SSO.
To enable SSO, contact the Simpliance Remo admin. Once enabled, you can access multiple apps with a single login.
SSO simplifies login processes and enhances security by allowing access to multiple apps with one set of credentials.

patterns: How do I view my profile?
What details are in my profile?
Can I update my profile?
What is the View Profile tab?
Where can I see my user details?
responses: You can view your profile details, such as name, email, and contact information, in the View Profile tab.
The View Profile tab displays your personal and organizational details, including your user ID and group information.
Your profile includes details like your name, email, contact number, and user group. Contact the admin to update this information.

patterns: How do I change my password?
Where is the Change Password option?
Can I reset my password?
What if I forget my password?
How do I update my password?
responses: You can change your password in the Change Password tab. Ensure your new password meets the security requirements.
To change your password, go to the Change Password tab and enter your current and new passwords.
If you forget your password, use the 'Forgot Password' option to reset it.

patterns: How do I configure account settings?
What are account settings?
How do I select a legal entity?
Can I change my approval level?
Where are the account settings?
responses: Configure account settings by selecting a legal entity and setting your approval level in the Account Settings tab.
Account settings allow you to select a legal entity and define your approval level for compliance tasks.
You can update your account settings, including legal entity and approval level, in the Account Settings tab.

patterns: How do I configure mail settings?
Can I disable email notifications?
What is the Mail On/Off feature?
How do I set email preferences?
Where are mail settings located?
responses: You can configure mail settings in the My Account-Settings tab. Group Admins can enable or disable email notifications.
Mail settings allow you to control email notifications. Group Admins can use the Mail On/Off feature to set preferences.
To configure mail settings, go to the My Account-Settings tab and adjust your email preferences.

patterns: How do I set reminders?
What are reminder settings?
Can I customize reminder frequency?
How do I manage reminders?
Where are reminder settings located?
responses: You can set reminders for compliance tasks in the Reminder Settings tab. Customize the number of days for reminders.
Reminder settings allow you to configure alerts for overdue tasks and reassign blocked Service Providers.
To manage reminders, go to the Reminder Settings tab and customize the frequency and recipients.

patterns: How do I change the theme?
Can I customize the interface?
How do I log out?
Where is the logout option?
How do I change the backdrop color?
responses: You can change the backdrop color in the Theme tab to personalize the interface.
To log out, click the Log Out option in the menu. You will be redirected to the login page.
Customize the interface by changing the backdrop color in the Theme tab. Log out using the Log Out option.
